description: SG&A allocation configuration. Update when methodology changes.

by_salary_ratio.description: Split proportionally by each spa's salary cost / total salary cost. Pool amount read from Raw - SG&A Detail tab, category 'Split by salary cost'.

by_sales_ratio.description: Split proportionally by each spa's revenue / total revenue. Pool amount read from Raw - SG&A Detail tab, category 'Split by sales ratio among all the Spas'.

equal_split.description: Split equally among all active spas. Pool amount read from Raw - SG&A Detail tab, category 'Split equally among all 8 Spa'.

direct_allocations.description: Line items allocated directly to a specific spa by name match in the description field. Read from Raw - SG&A Detail tab where the spa name appears in the row.
direct_allocations.matching_rules: Match spa name (or short_name from spa-list.json) in the SG&A line item description. Items not matching any spa go into the allocation pools above.
